Title: Prevented double EN + AR chat bubble lines caused by enabling both Chat EN and Chat TR.
Stabilized QuestMapFrame translation behavior.
Corrected RTL and translation application logic.
Removed duplicate tooltip font and hook logic from config.
Centralized Arabic font application.
Introduced shared data-driven UI translation helper.
Centralized RTL detection via `ns.RTL.IsRTL()`.
Consolidated legacy `ST_*` globals.
Deduplicated hook/ticker wiring.
Reduced config tab boilerplate.
Fixed AceDB persistence issue.
Fixed AR reward/questline labels clipping on the right edge.
Fixed missing inline quest icons (e.g. “!” / texture tags) in Arabic view.
Fixed missing quest title “!” icon when switching to Arabic fonts.
Preserved generic `|H...|h...|h` hyperlinks through reversal.
Fixed “□1□” placeholders appearing in Arabic quest titles.
Quest title repeatable icon extraction now supports inline atlas/texture tags inside `|H...|h...|h` display text.
Moved quest title icon overlay to the RTL side (right) for Arabic.
Unified quest text column widths for consistent wrapping.
Quest title overlay icon: tooltip hover + stable placement in QuestMapFrame.
Replaced AceConfig options UI with a Plumber-style ControlCenter settings panel.
Updated Arabic changelog entries shown in Release Notes.
Added an HTML mockup of the ControlCenter panel for design review outside WoW.
Made the HTML mock match the in-game ControlCenter layout 1:1 (Modules + Release Notes).
Persisted browser-preview layout tweaks (tabbar + border sizing).
Restored 1:1 layout parity with in-game `common/Config/ControlCenter/*` (tabs outside frame).
Fixed category header layering + fonts in the HTML mock.
Removed unused `WoWAR/Images/ControlCenter/*` files.
Restored missing ExpansionLandingPage textures required for the in-game border.
Fixed “Show minimap icon” toggle stuck ON in ControlCenter.
Made Release Notes (مذكرات الإصدار) render RTL for Arabic only.
Kept the changelog version/date header LTR in Arabic.
Added Arabic (easy) descriptions for all config options (Summary + Tip) and wired them into the UI.
Fixed AR option descriptions not being shaped + colored.
Hardened Storyline integration and improved Arabic UI.
Fixed quest title decoration glyph disappearing when switching between QuestMapFrame and QuestFrame.
Implemented dynamic value substitution for `{1}`, `{2}`, `{3}` tooltip placeholders.
Added printf-style format token protection to prevent RTL reversal corruption.
Added Blizzard dynamic placeholder `{1}`, `{2}` protection for defensive RTL safety.
Fixed RTL reversal of substituted numeric values ("20" → "02" bug).
Right-justified tooltip lines in Arabic to feel RTL.
Fixed `{3}` placeholder showing comma instead of number.
Fixed RTL justification applying to English tooltips without translation.
Fixed Release Notes dates showing “today” for all versions.
Fixed `AS_UTF8charbytes` returning nil for NUL bytes (0x00), causing arithmetic crashes.
Corrected Persian/Urdu letter presentation-form mappings (پ/چ/ژ/گ/ک/ڌ/ی).
Fixed GitHub Actions release workflow to package `common/` as a folder.
Standardized on `WOWTR_*` as the primary namespace and kept `WoWTR_*` only as legacy aliases.
Fixed Arabic “Original” preview rendering in the reshaper tool.
Fixed Latin runs (e.g. `WoWAR.lua`) not being pre-reversed for Mixed entries.
Moved legacy root `WoW_*.lua` files into `common/` (Option B layout).
Removed unused “online translation” table `QTR_Tlumacz_Online` and its helper `pairsByKeys()`.
Removed orphaned `QTR_ObjectiveTracker_Check` hook call.
Reduced LuaLS noise for UI globals in `common/UI/Frames.lua`.
Cleaned LuaLS “undefined global” noise in DialogueUI integration.
Added in-game command to clear agent SavedVariables logs to prevent dump buildup.
Added floating “Debug Tools” UI with clickable dump/clear actions; removed editor-only region markers.
Removed automatic ticker-driven agent instrumentation from Professions + ticker clamp.
Added “Dump Visible UI” (dump everything currently visible on screen) + updated messaging to point to `/wowardebug`.
Cleaned LuaLS diagnostics in quest details handling.
Added a WoWAR.lua SavedVariables explainer page (EN + Arabic notes).
Added agent NDJSON logging + Professions probes for runtime evidence.
Clamp `StartTicker(..., 0)` intervals to prevent per-frame churn.
Removed unused legacy AceConfig “Tabs” implementation files.
Improve agent log run separation + add Professions call-rate metrics.
Added Professions UI string dump command for bulk extraction.
Added clickable Debug Tools UI (`/wowardebug`) with smart Dump Visible UI.
Removed manual frame targeting from Debug Tools UI.
Filtered numeric ratio noise like `0 / 1000`.
Treat Arabic UI text as “already localized” in missing-only dumps.
Remove implicit globals for quest de-dupe markers.
Removed standalone Changelog popup UI; keep only embedded ControlCenter “Release Notes”.
Added “UI Art / Structure” dump (textures + layout manifest) to help recreate Blizzard-style UIs.
Tweaked `/wowardebug` panel spacing + hint text after adding “Include art”.
Added a first-run Welcome modal that matches the ControlCenter settings style.
Switched Welcome modal border + Arabic rendering for correct bidi behavior.
Improved anchor path resolution in UI art dumps.
Re-skinned Welcome modal to match Blizzard SplashFrame art/layout.
Localized Welcome UI strings (Arabic-only when RTL).
Switched Welcome text scrolling to use the same ScrollView/ScrollBar as ControlCenter.
Fixed "Keep Latin words LTR" to not re-reverse already-reversed Latin in shaped entries.
Fix slash commands like `/wowardebug` to render correctly in WoW RTL.
Ensure `/command` tokens aren’t treated as “protected” during reshaping.
Added “Unshape” mode to convert presentation-form Arabic back to base (unshaped) text.
Prevented ALEF (FE8E) mapping collisions that produced “آ” in common words.
Added tooltips with before/after examples for Options toggles.
Fixed option tooltips positioning so they stay within the visible page.
Clarified tooltips with explicit Checked vs Unchecked outcomes.
Auto-fix curly color span direction so `{c...}TEXT{r}` colors the intended segment.
Guard Arabic detection against secret values
Remove RTL title padding from quest headers
Add spacing between quest title icon glyph and text
Pad only ! title glyph overlay
Add width snapshot logs for quest translation passes
Add /wowardebugsettings shortcut for debug toggles
Make /wowardebug open debug settings UI
Make /wowardebug a tabbed settings/tools UI
Reserve quest title glyph space + add /wowardebug debug-print toggle
Tabbed /wowardebug UI with Settings + Tools tabs
Fix EN toggle showing blank text - prevent capturing Arabic as English
Reserve space for RTL quest title glyph to prevent overlap
Merged DebugUI into DebugToolsUI with tabbed interface
Make QuestMapFrame __post__ translation reapply run once
Avoid QuestMapFrame forced reprocess spam; schedule single __post__ reapply
Suppress rapid duplicate QuestMapFrame __force__ QuestPrepare calls
Schedule one __post__ after toggle when title glyph present (QuestMapFrame)
Cache QuestMapFrame title glyph for toggle stability
Avoid overriding decorated title on QuestMapFrame toggle
Force quick __post__ after toggle to keep glyph inside QuestMapFrame
Set quest title glyph offset X=20 and reserve width accordingly
Stabilize QuestMapFrame title width when glyph offset changes
Consolidated quest header width adjustment
Tuned welcome bidi width and title font
Centered welcome title shaping and narrowed body width
Initialized memory system (Memory v3.2.2)
Fixed Mnemo vector layer runtime compatibility and .env key loading
Added tiny vector smoke test script for Mnemo vector layer
Removed temporary vector smoke script and validated normal vector tool flow
Enforced mandatory vector-first retrieval policy in Cursor rules
Enforced post-vector grounding to prevent digest-only answers
